falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes above 5,600 on any day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 'bottom_2024_aug' pattern match, as that pattern resolved with lower lows and consolidation; breaking to new highs indicates the macro engine misidentified the structure and the signal should have been BULLISH not HOLD/accumulation

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.00 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained sub-12 VIX contradicts the elevated volatility regime typical of bottom formations; this would signal complacency/early-cycle risk-on behavior, proving the BLOWOFF SCORE of 40 was overstated and the bottoming pattern was false

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.50% and DXY simultaneously breaks above 105.00
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination signals a deflationary/liquidity crisis shock, not a market bottom; the bottom_2024_aug pattern occurred during stable/rising yields and moderate dollar conditions, so this divergence proves the macro regime is incompatible with the matched pattern

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
